patch.value: Refactor runUpdate (~950-line function) into table-driven per-field apply helpers

code-quality audit F2: src/cli/commands/update.ts runUpdate is one ~950-line high-complexity function (177 ifs, depth 8) with fragile non-null assertions (options.x!). Extract per-field applyXField helpers (clearCollectionDefinitions is a precedent) to remove the assertions and improve testability. Stays under the 3400 LOC gate.

patch.value: Refactored runUpdate scalar metadata mutation handling into table-driven helpers while preserving update ordering and behavior.
runUpdate no longer carries repeated inline scalar mutation blocks or fragile non-null assertions for those fields, and existing update behavior remains covered.

src/cli/commands/update.ts now uses shared scalar mutation definitions for post-tag, stakeholder, and issue metadata fields; focused tests, full coverage, release gates, temp smoke, Sentry, telemetry, changelog, health, and validate gates passed.
